title: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs
innovation_summary: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs: We study generalist video temporal grounding, in which one model predicts a variable-cardinality set of evidence intervals across video lengths, domains, query forms, and viewpoints.
